name: wren-engine
description: AI agent skills for Wren Engine CLI — semantic SQL layer for 22+ data sources.

skills.name: wren-generate-mdl
skills.description: Generate a Wren MDL project by exploring a database with available tools (SQLAlchemy, database drivers, MCP connectors, or raw SQL). Guides agents through schema discovery, type normalization, and MDL YAML generation using the wren CLI.

skills.name: wren-usage
skills.description: Wren Engine CLI workflow guide for AI agents. Answer data questions end-to-end using the wren CLI: gather schema context, recall past queries, write SQL through the MDL semantic layer, execute, and learn from confirmed results.
